sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports shortness of breath, chest pain, and denies other symptoms. He reports a blood pressure of 180/95 in the emergency room and feels it was surprising. The patient denies any family history of heart disease.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals an enlarged thyroid without tenderness, a carotid bruit on the right, clear lungs, and a regular heart rhythm with a systolic ejection murmur. The patient has a healed scar from a prior knee surgery and no lower extremity edema.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms and physical exam findings are concerning for possible cardiac issues, including hypertension and potential heart disease. The echocardiogram revealed a low pumping function of the heart.
medical_concepts: low pumping function of the heart

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor will prescribe carvedilol 25 milligrams twice a day and lisinopril 10 milligrams a day. The doctor will order a cardiac catheterization.

medical_concepts: low pumping function of the heart
